mapper.insert: INSERT INTO albums ( album_id, album_name, album_cover_url ) VALUES ( #{albumId}, #{albumName}, #{albumCoverUrl} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE album_name = VALUES(album_name), album_cover_url = VALUES(album_cover_url)

INSERT INTO music_features ( music_id, album_id, track_name, artist_name, popularity, energy, danceability, happiness, acousticness, instrumentalness, liveness, speechiness ) VALUES ( #{musicId}, #{albumId}, #{trackName}, #{artistName}, #{popularity}, #{energy}, #{danceability}, #{happiness}, #{acousticness}, #{instrumentalness}, #{liveness}, #{speechiness} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE album_id = VALUES(album_id), track_name = VALUES(track_name), artist_name = VALUES(artist_name), popularity = VALUES(popularity), energy = VALUES(energy), danceability = VALUES(danceability), happiness = VALUES(happiness), acousticness = VALUES(acousticness), instrumentalness = VALUES(instrumentalness), liveness = VALUES(liveness), speechiness = VALUES(speechiness)
mapper.select: SELECT mf.music_id AS trackId, mf.track_name AS trackName, mf.artist_name AS artistName, a.album_id AS albumId, a.album_name AS albumName, a.album_cover_url AS albumCoverUrl FROM user_fav_music ufm JOIN music_features mf ON ufm.music_id = mf.music_id JOIN albums a ON mf.album_id = a.album_id WHERE ufm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ufm.created_at ASC
